name: Picnic-Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 375F.
2. Combine buttermilk and pepper in a ceramic bowl or baking dish.
3. Remove the skin from chicken and place it in the buttermilk. Cover and refrigerate for 3 hours, turning once.
4. Place flour on a plate.
5. Remove chicken from buttermilk, pat dry, and dredge in flour.
6. Fill a large, heavy skillet with 1-inch oil. When hot, add chicken without crowding and fry, turning once, until golden on both sides. You may have to fry in batches.
7. Remove pieces as they are done and drain on paper towels.
8. Arrange chicken on a rack in a roasting pan.
9. Bake for 10-to-15 minutes or until the chicken is well done.
10. Let chicken cool to room temperature before refrigerating or packing into a picnic hamper.
